{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032305174578BDDD3F8B54A313482A"}"},"total":722},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7571767393590690622","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"蛮好看的书，可惜没多角色配音也没真人配音版，听书模式下是真变扭，希望，能变长篇，加点化形男宠剧情，加点斗嘴、调皮，团结友爱的画面的内容，外加无限制宠物数量，写成山海神兽篇就更牛了，这书🫡"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762942760,"group_id":"7350968358222711870","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"热血沸腾的兄弟情谊最珍贵，世上亲情难奢望。刀剑如梦伴我一世，仗剑天涯，持刀斩魔⚆_⚆        天道轮回苍天饶过谁，愿有一天能穿越当主角😏","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8TAn0bIS270YxiH+KBpZRI0VLpw/yAo7H5jwI8lWQjq","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0beda375c445468eb024d493aa979dcc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787744&x-signature=jKxtbZ%2B5Ia5%2F%2BE5gaORgEjZ4Yhs%3D","user_id":"3403697496791549","user_name":"天道殿-染心尘-神魔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3403697496791549","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7350968358222711870","book_info":{"abstract":"【杀伐果断】+【无敌流】+【多女主】
游戏降临现实，混沌裂缝开启，深渊入侵。
蓝星进入全民转职时代，可以通过努力杀怪升级，不断转职变强！
江安成为了一名召唤师，拥有神级天赋神之心。
只要完成任务，便能不断提纯血脉，直到将其进化为神兽！
火狐血脉进化→二尾狐→……→神兽九尾妖神
黑白熊猫血脉进化→铸铁黑白熊猫→……→神兽混沌熊猫
三色鹿血脉进化→五色鹿→……→神兽白泽
……
……
随着神兽血脉不断激活，召唤兽们的画风也逐渐奇怪了起来。
九尾妖神：你们这些新来的都给我听好了，主人喜欢听话会来事儿的！懂吗？
白泽摸摸鹿角，俯下身子：姐姐！姐姐！是这样吗？
江安：……
直到裂缝彻底打开，深渊全面入侵。
人族溃败。
江安一人带着召唤兽闯入深渊通道。
所有人只能听见通道里传来的凄厉嘶吼声。
“夭寿了！他召唤的怎么全是神兽！”
PS：本书又名《深渊入侵？神级天赋养出兽娘军团》《说好的召唤兽，进化成妖神女帝？》","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c90a6f72ea966eaf7a265e6247f3cc89","author":"一口","author_id":"","book_id":"7350968358222711870","book_name":"我把召唤兽养成绝色女帝！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d89058","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7350970805062222398","read_count":"42612","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3117513"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"1183","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,天才,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/cd2c0cadc2e5fe94965973e6143eec34~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779398265&x-signature=7rzWzr7pY9aqMVQstL%2FBj3u07OM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2845144788238504","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"239"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032305174578BDDD3F8B54A313482A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读21小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":77033,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":77233,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":13412},"user_action":{"au
